title: cynoglossum reuteri
intro: Cynoglossum reuteri, also known as Reuter's Hound's Tongue, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the borage family. Traditionally, Cynoglossum reuteri is used in herbal medicine for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate pain. The health benefits of this plant include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive disorders, and respiratory problems. Cynoglossum reuteri can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being.
